lb-00et.title: SaveManager v9: serialize/deserialize multi-location state
lb-00et.description: Bump SAVE_VERSION to 9. Serialize locations[] and currentLocationId. Migration from v8: wrap existing flat state into locations[0]. Ensure save slot metadata shows location count.

lb-05nr.title: Bump version to 1.0.0 for feature-complete release

lb-067a.title: getSeasonResult omits last-day dailyRevenue from win check
lb-067a.description: In getSeasonResult() (GameState.ts:907), the revenue check uses this.seasonRevenue but not dailyRevenue. showSeasonResults() is called before startNewDay() (which accumulates dailyRevenue into seasonRevenue), so the final day earnings are excluded from the win check. The results panel compensates in the display (GameplayScene.ts:1155: seasonRevenue + loc.dailyRevenue) but the pass/fail logic does not. Fix: in getSeasonResult(), compute effectiveRevenue = this.seasonRevenue + this.loc.dailyRevenue (and sum across all locations in franchise mode) before comparing to revenueTarget.

lb-0hec.title: Location-aware scenes: scope Shop/Staff/Equipment to active location
lb-0hec.description: Update ShopScene, StaffScene, EquipmentScene, MenuEditorScene, and other modal scenes to read/write from gameState.locations[currentLocationId] instead of flat gameState properties. Add location name indicator in scene headers.

lb-0mfz.title: Wire CharityDriveScene to GameplayScene prep phase
lb-0mfz.description: Add Participate button during prep when Charity Drive event is active. Register scene in main.ts. Update event effects to be interactive instead of auto-applied.

lb-0n2d.title: customerArrive/Leave SFX defined but never called
lb-0n2d.description: AudioManager defines customerArrive() and customerLeave() SFX methods, and lb-sazy spec requires wiring these to gameplay events. But there are zero call sites — neither CustomerManager nor GameplayScene triggers these. Wire customerArrive() when a customer joins the queue, and customerLeave() when patience expires and they leave unhappy.

lb-1p7y.title: Create CharityDriveScene with donation level selection
lb-1p7y.description: New scene where player picks donation tier (10%/25%/50%) during prep phase. Higher donation = bigger reputation boost. Shows projected donation amount and rep bonus.

lb-1q4b.title: Save/load game system
lb-1q4b.description: Auto-save at end of day to localStorage, manual save slots, load from main menu

lb-1sy2.title: Build LeaderboardScene with challenge scores overview
lb-1sy2.description: Create LeaderboardScene showing all 6 challenges with best scores, star ratings, and total stars. Include summary stats.

lb-2q6a.title: Bulk discount not shown in shop price display
lb-2q6a.description: In ShopScene, the PRICE column shows the per-batch price without discount, and the Buy button shows no pre-purchase total. The discount is only applied silently at purchase time (ShopScene.ts:248-249). The static hint text requires mental math. Fix: update the priceText or buyBtn label dynamically when qty changes to show the effective per-batch price or total after discount (e.g. 'Buy — .50 → .05 (10% off)').

lb-3212.title: Add Settings button to MainMenuScene
lb-3212.description: Settings (colorblind mode, text size, day length) is only accessible during gameplay via PauseScene. Add a Settings button to the main menu for convenience.

lb-38is.title: Fix UI scenes to display loc.money instead of top-level money
lb-38is.description: SignageScene, LoanScene, MarketingScene, DecorScene, SeatingScene, PopUpBoothScene all display/check gameState.money instead of gameState.loc.money

lb-3hrb.title: Add Load Game option to MainMenuScene for manual save slots
lb-3hrb.description: MainMenuScene only shows Continue (auto-save). With manual save slots now available via PauseScene, add a Load Game button to main menu that shows slot selection.

lb-3l93.title: Multi-location franchise system for Season 5
lb-3l93.description: Season 5 requires multi-location oversight and brand consistency management. Large feature: managing multiple stores, hiring managers, brand standards, aggregate financials.

lb-3pxv.title: Ingredient purchasing shop in prepare phase
lb-3pxv.description: Shop UI during prepare phase to buy ingredients from suppliers. Price fluctuations, quantity selection.

lb-4ar8.title: Replace any types with proper LocationState/DayReport in GameplayScene
lb-4ar8.description: Season results aggregation used any[] and any in reduce callbacks

lb-4arw.title: HUD improvements: equipment alerts and staff count display
lb-4arw.description: Show broken equipment warnings in HUD during serve phase. Display active staff count. Show daily maintenance/wage costs in prepare phase summary.

lb-4ffx.title: Order error rate from staff accuracy
lb-4ffx.description: Spec says accuracy determines 'order error rate' but implementation only uses accuracy as quality/tip multiplier. Add chance of wrong order based on low accuracy: wrong flavor served, customer satisfaction penalty. Not high priority since accuracy already affects quality.

lb-4hlh.title: Tutorial last step SPACE key tip is wrong
lb-4hlh.description: TutorialScene binds SPACE to advance()/closeTutorial() globally. The last tutorial step body says 'Press SPACE to change game speed', but pressing SPACE on that step closes the tutorial instead of changing speed. The tip should be removed or changed to say 'After the tutorial, press SPACE to change game speed', and ideally the SPACE binding should not apply on the final step.

lb-4isc.title: Staff training progression system
lb-4isc.description: SPEC says training programs improve skills over time. Currently staff_training research node only gives cost discounts. Add: ability to send staff to training (costs money + time), gradually improves their speed/accuracy/friendliness stats.

lb-4p2n.title: showChallengeResults reads stale top-level dayReports instead of loc.dayReports
lb-4p2n.description: In GameplayScene.showChallengeResults() (line 1795-1797), totalRevenue/totalServed/totalLost are computed from s.dayReports (the top-level GameState.dayReports field, which is never populated since the franchise refactor). All day reports are pushed to s.loc.dayReports. Result: challenge results always show $0 revenue, 0 stars, and no customers served/lost. Fix: replace s.dayReports with s.loc.dayReports on those three lines.

lb-4zye.title: Reputation mutations bypass loc in franchise mode
lb-4zye.description: calculateReputationChange() (GameState.ts:622) writes to this.reputation and this.reputationMomentum/criticReviews instead of this.loc equivalents. GameplayScene.ts lines 989, 996, 1003 also write this.gameState.reputation directly. In franchise mode (Season 5), this.loc.reputation points to the per-location field but these mutations go to the top-level field. Effect: reputation never changes in Season 5 -- win check via getFranchiseStats().totalReputation reads the frozen initial value, and the end-of-day display (which correctly reads s.loc.reputation) also shows the frozen value. Fix: in calculateReputationChange(), replace this.reputation with this.loc.reputation, this.reputationMomentum with this.loc.reputationMomentum, and this.criticReviews.push with this.loc.criticReviews.push. In GameplayScene.ts lines 989/996/1003, replace this.gameState.reputation with this.gameState.loc.reputation.

lb-5a3z.title: Early game balance and feel
lb-5a3z.description: Umbrella for issues affecting the early game experience: level pacing and supply/resupply mechanics.

lb-5h12.title: Generate placeholder scoop textures for all flavors in BootScene
lb-5h12.description: Only vanilla, chocolate, and strawberry have scoop textures. GameplayScene display case skips rendering for flavors without textures. Generate colored circle textures for all 21 flavors.

lb-5kk6.title: Implement VIP perks system
lb-5kk6.description: VIPs unlock perks when satisfied: reputation bonus, tip boost for future customers, premium pricing tolerance. Track VIP satisfaction count in GameState.

lb-5ryn.title: Apply charity donation at end of day
lb-5ryn.description: Deduct donation from revenue and add scaled reputation bonus in end-of-day processing. Show donation in end-of-day report.

lb-63bm.title: Show ambiance score in decor and HUD UI
lb-63bm.description: Decor themes have ambiance values but no UI shows the current score or its effects on patience/price tolerance.

lb-6anj.title: Add day length setting to SettingsScene
lb-6anj.description: Spec says day duration should be configurable (5-15 min). dayDurationMs exists on GameState but no UI to change it. Add a day length toggle in SettingsScene (Short 3min / Normal 5min / Long 10min). Persist in settings.

lb-6f4u.title: Add new player tutorial
lb-6f4u.description: Player feedback: overall lack of guidance makes early game confusing. A tutorial covering mandatory mechanics (food purchase, supply quantities, day/night resupply restrictions) would significantly improve onboarding.

lb-6smz.title: Dietary restrictions have no satisfaction penalty when violated
lb-6smz.description: Customer.ts assigns vegan/nut-free restrictions but there is no gameplay consequence when incompatible items are served. At game start all flavors contain milk, so the flavorPool fallback (Customer.ts generateOrder) silently serves vegan customers dairy with no reputation or satisfaction hit. Spec implies restrictions should affect gameplay. Add a satisfaction/tip penalty when a served order contains ingredients incompatible with the customer's restriction.

lb-7az7.title: Apply scaledFontSize to all remaining hardcoded font sizes in GameplayScene
lb-7az7.description: GameplayScene still has ~34 hardcoded fontSize values (HUD, end-of-day report, event notifications, gameplay tips, etc.) that don't respect the text size accessibility setting. Convert all to use scaledFontSize().

lb-7k97.title: unlockFlavor bypasses loc.flavors in franchise mode
lb-7k97.description: purchaseResearch() calls unlockFlavor() which pushes to this.flavors (top-level GameState field, line 1050 of GameState.ts) rather than this.loc.flavors. After initFranchiseMode() runs, these are separate arrays. Researching a new flavor in Season 5 franchise mode does not make it available for ordering at any franchise location. Fix: unlockFlavor() should also update this.loc.flavors (and optionally all locations) when franchiseMode is true.

lb-80wv.title: Show daily revenue tracker in HUD top bar
lb-80wv.description: Spec says top bar should show daily revenue tracker. Currently only shows total money. Add dailyRevenue display.

lb-86z6.title: UI polish: weather display, accessibility, side panels
lb-86z6.description: Add weather display in top bar, accessibility options, side panel improvements

lb-88xk.title: Mobile viewport and touch input setup
lb-88xk.description: Fix viewport meta for mobile (disable zoom, handle safe areas), prevent default touch behaviors (bounce scroll, pinch zoom, long-press context menu), add orientation lock hint via CSS/manifest

lb-8k4p.title: Sandbox unlimited funds broken in franchise mode
lb-8k4p.description: In GameplayScene, sandbox mode refills money using 'this.gameState.money = 99999'. In non-franchise mode this works because loc returns 'this as any', making loc.money === this.money. But in franchise mode (Season 5), loc returns locations[currentLocationId], so loc.money is a separate per-location field. ShopScene deducts from loc.money, but the sandbox refill only writes to top-level this.gameState.money — the location's money never gets refilled. Fix: use this.gameState.loc.money = 99999 in both the init block (GameplayScene.ts ~line 44) and the day-start handler (~line 1114).

lb-8ln2.title: Staff scheduling system
lb-8ln2.description: Implement staff shift scheduling: assign staff to specific day shifts, schedule fairness affects morale, over/understaffing effects

lb-8okd.title: Fix overlapping text in upper left

lb-8osg.title: Add staff specialty system with task-specific bonuses
lb-8osg.description: Add specialty field to StaffMember (scooping, blending, cashiering). Apply bonus multipliers when staff work on matching tasks. Show specialty in StaffScene UI.

lb-9ifa.title: Touch target audit missed SettingsScene and ResearchScene buttons
lb-9ifa.description:
The mobile touch target audit (commit a07d7bc) missed several interactive buttons that still have padding y:4, giving button heights of ~22-26px — below the 44px mobile guideline.

Specific locations:
- src/scenes/SettingsScene.ts:103 — colorblind toggle (y:4, 18px font)
- src/scenes/SettingsScene.ts:129 — text size S/M/L buttons (y:4, 18px font)
- src/scenes/SettingsScene.ts:156 — day length 3m/5m/10m buttons (y:4, 16px font)
- src/scenes/ResearchScene.ts:196 — Research unlock button (y:4, 14px font)
- src/scenes/FranchiseScene.ts:210 — Send Staff button (y:4, 13px font)
- src/scenes/PauseScene.ts:154,164 — Save/Load slot action buttons added in this branch (y:4, 14px font)
- src/scenes/MainMenuScene.ts:205 — Load game slot button (y:4, 14px font)

The SettingsScene case is most impactful: a player increasing text size on mobile must tap small buttons to do so. Fix: change padding to y:8 for all interactive buttons in these scenes.

lb-9v3z.title: Marketing campaigns system
lb-9v3z.description: Marketing campaigns: local ads, social media, loyalty cards. Each costs money but boosts customer volume or reputation for duration

lb-9z5o.title: Vegan customers always violated in Season 1: no dairy-free starter flavor
lb-9z5o.description:
All three starter flavors (vanilla, chocolate, strawberry) contain 'milk', which is in DAIRY_INGREDIENTS. Vegan customers (15% spawn rate) have an empty allowedFlavors pool and fall back to the full menu in generateOrder() (Customer.ts:~194). orderViolatesRestriction() then returns true for every vegan customer, causing 0 tip and 50% satisfaction throughout Season 1 — silently tanking reputation.

lemon_sorbet is the only dairy-free flavor and is only available via research/events, so this can persist for the entire game.

Fix options (pick one):
1. Add lemon_sorbet (or another dairy-free flavor) as a guaranteed starter or early Season 1 unlock.
2. Skip assigning DietaryRestriction.VEGAN when no vegan-compatible flavor exists in availableFlavors.
3. Treat the fallback path (allowedFlavors empty) as non-violating — the customer accepts what is available.

lb-a0eg.title: Pop-up booth revenue not added to game state money
lb-a0eg.description: NOT A BUG - revenue is already applied at lines 494-501 of PopUpBoothScene.ts: loc.money, loc.dailyRevenue, totalCustomersServed, totalRevenue all updated correctly.

lb-a6va.title: Victory screen button color should match victory theme
lb-a6va.description: Return to Main Menu button uses blue #2980B9 instead of a gold/victory-themed color to match the FFD700 accent.

lb-a7v8.title: No tutorial explaining food purchase is mandatory
lb-a7v8.description: Player feedback: buying food is required but there is no in-game guidance telling players this. Needs tutorial or onboarding prompt.

lb-actv.title: Community events: pop-up booth mini-game
lb-actv.description: Implement pop-up booth at local fairs as a mini-game for bonus revenue. Player can set up a temporary booth with limited menu, serve customers in a timed challenge.

lb-ae53.title: Add accessibility settings (colorblind mode, text size)
lb-ae53.description: Add settings scene accessible from pause menu with colorblind palette toggle and text size scaling options. Persist in localStorage.

lb-ak2s.title: Core game state machine and scene management
lb-ak2s.description: Boot scene, main menu scene, gameplay scene, pause menu. Scene transitions and shared game state.

lb-alzl.title: Add fullscreen toggle button for mobile browsers
lb-alzl.description: Add a fullscreen toggle accessible from the main menu and pause menu that uses the Fullscreen API

lb-aqtx.title: Fix build: correct tsc invocation and type errors
lb-aqtx.description: npx tsc resolved to wrong package; ServeResult missing loyaltyDiscount; SaveManager missing CateringContract types

lb-b608.title: breakdownMult event effect never applied to equipment degradation
lb-b608.description: GameEventEffects.breakdownMult is defined in EventManager but never read by degradeEquipment() in GameState. Events with this field have no effect on breakdown chance.

lb-b6u3.title: Data model: LocationState and multi-location GameState refactor
lb-b6u3.description: Add LocationState interface containing per-location data (money pool, reputation, equipment, staff, inventory, recipes). Refactor GameState to hold locations[] array and currentLocationId. All existing single-location properties that become per-location should be nested inside LocationState. Add franchise-level aggregates (totalFranchiseRevenue, overallReputation). Ensure backwards compat: when locations[] is empty/missing, treat current flat state as location 0.

lb-be71.title: Menu editor for setting prices and toggling flavors
lb-be71.description: Pause menu Menu Editor button opens a scene where player can set custom prices per flavor, toggle flavors on/off, see popularity stats.

lb-byoe.title: Low stock warnings during serve phase
lb-byoe.description: Show warning indicators when ingredient stock is critically low during the serve phase

lb-bz3n.title: Low-stock threshold inconsistency between ShopScene and GameplayScene
lb-bz3n.description: ShopScene hardcodes isLow = currentQty < 10 for base ingredients. GameplayScene uses LOW_THRESHOLD = 5 for serve-phase warnings. Players see a low-stock warning in the shop at qty 8 but no warning during serving at the same qty. Extract a shared LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD constant in constants.ts and use it in both places.

lb-c2lm.title: Apply scaledFontSize to challenge results modal
lb-c2lm.description: showChallengeResults() in GameplayScene uses hardcoded font sizes instead of scaledFontSize().

lb-c5yf.title: Build AudioManager with procedural SFX generation
lb-c5yf.description: Create src/systems/AudioManager.ts using Web Audio API to generate procedural sound effects. No audio files needed. Singleton pattern, accessible from any scene. Include methods for common SFX: click, purchase, serve, cash register, error, success, notification.

lb-c6a6.title: Add soft-serve cone/cup as distinct serving styles requiring Soft-Serve Machine
lb-c6a6.description: SPEC says soft-serve machine enables soft-serve options with additional flavor channels. Machine exists but no soft-serve serving styles. Add soft-serve cone and soft-serve cup styles that require SOFT_SERVE_MACHINE equipment.

lb-cbmk.title: TutorialScene highlight border leaks between steps
lb-cbmk.description: In TutorialScene.showStep(), each step with a highlight creates a new Graphics object named 'highlightBorder', but the cleanup logic is broken: getByName returns the first match (not the newest), so old borders survive and accumulate in the scene. The declared 'oldBorder' variable is also unused. Fix: add a private highlightBorder class field, destroy it before creating a new one each step.

lb-civj.title: Tutorial fires in Sandbox mode
lb-civj.description: GameplayScene line 94 checks challengeDef to skip tutorial but only excludes Challenge mode. Sandbox also has challengeDef=null so tutorial fires there too. Fix: add gameMode !== sandbox to the condition. Spec says Sandbox is unlimited funds, no failure, experiment freely - tutorial should not fire.

lb-cn3r.title: Financial System
lb-cn3r.description: Revenue, expenses, pricing, loans, end-of-day reports

lb-cprr.title: End-of-day revenue chart blank/stale in franchise mode
lb-cprr.description: In GameplayScene showDayReport(), the revenue trend chart reads from s.dayReports.slice(-7) (top-level GameState field). Since commit 63f3af7, day reports are pushed to s.loc.dayReports. In non-franchise mode (Seasons 1-4), s.loc returns s as any so they are the same array and there is no issue. In franchise mode (Season 5), s.loc returns s.locations[currentLocationId], so new day reports go to the location-scoped array while the chart still reads the stale top-level s.dayReports which only contains pre-franchise days. Fix: change the chart data source to s.loc.dayReports.slice(-7).

lb-ct8e.title: Redundant gameModeTutorialCheck variable in GameplayScene.create()
lb-ct8e.description: In GameplayScene.create(), 'gameMode' is declared at the top of the method (line ~35). Later, 'gameModeTutorialCheck' is declared with the identical registry read (line ~70) and used only to gate the tutorial launch. Since both variables always hold the same value, gameModeTutorialCheck is dead code duplication. Replace gameModeTutorialCheck with the existing gameMode variable to avoid confusion.

lb-d137.title: Tutorial text contradicts emergency resupply feature
lb-d137.description: TutorialScene Step index 3 ('Step 3: Open Your Store') tells new players: 'Tip: You CANNOT resupply during the day, so make sure you buy enough beforehand.' But the same branch added an emergency resupply button visible during the serve phase when stock hits zero. The tutorial gives incorrect information that contradicts an existing feature. Fix the copy to acknowledge emergency resupply exists but costs 1.5x, and recommend buying enough up front to avoid that penalty.

lb-db57.title: Add ice cream sandwich serving style
lb-db57.description: Spec lists ice cream sandwiches as a serving style but it's missing from SERVING_STYLES in constants.ts. Add it as a style with appropriate pricing.

lb-dfd5.title: Brand consistency and cross-location effects
lb-dfd5.description: Franchise-level mechanics: shared marketing campaigns affect all locations, reputation spillover between locations (good or bad), brand consistency bonus when all locations share menu/decor standards, staff can be transferred between locations.

lb-dkny.title: Add low balance warning in story mode when approaching bankruptcy
lb-dkny.description: In story mode, show a warning notification when money drops below $0, alerting the player they risk bankruptcy (hard fail) at end of season if they don't recover. Currently there's no warning before the hard_fail check.

lb-dwfb.title: Game Day/Time System
lb-dwfb.description: In-game clock, day cycle (prepare/serve/earn phases), configurable day length (5-15 min real time)

lb-dxxj.title: Gameplay polish and missing features
lb-dxxj.description: Implement remaining spec features: staff specialties, loyalty point redemption, accessibility settings, and other gaps

lb-e0m1.title: Fix remaining GameState methods to use loc for franchise-mode consistency
lb-e0m1.description: startCampaign, buyDecor, buySeating, buySignage, takeLoan, makeLoanPayment all use this.money/this.dailyExpenses instead of this.loc.*. Same class of bug as lb-jql7.

lb-e4hg.title: Staff hiring and management UI
lb-e4hg.description: Hire staff with randomized stats, assign to stations, pay wages, morale system

lb-el96.title: Hot fudge and caramel toppings not blocked for vegan customers
lb-el96.description: toppingAllowed() in Customer.ts checks if the topping's ingredientId is in DAIRY_INGREDIENTS = ['milk', 'cream']. But hot fudge has ingredientId='hot_fudge' and caramel has ingredientId='caramel', neither of which is in DAIRY_INGREDIENTS. So vegan customers can be served hot fudge or caramel toppings without any dietary violation being detected. orderViolatesRestriction() returns false, no tip penalty, no warning shown. Fix: add 'hot_fudge' and 'caramel' to DAIRY_INGREDIENTS in constants.ts.

lb-els5.title: Emergency markup lost when switching supplier during resupply
lb-els5.description: In ShopScene.create() isEmergency is read from registry then registry key is cleared. When player switches supplier tab scene.restart() is called. On restart create() re-reads emergencyResupply which is now false so isEmergency becomes false 1.5x markup disappears and panel styling reverts. Fix: re-set emergencyResupply in registry to true before calling scene.restart() when isEmergency is true or persist isEmergency through restart some other way.

lb-eog0.title: Add self-serve vs staff-served topping mode to Toppings Bar
lb-eog0.description: SPEC mentions Toppings Bar supports 'self-serve or staff-served toppings'. Currently no distinction. Could add a toggle that affects speed (self-serve faster but less accurate) vs quality (staff-served slower but higher satisfaction).

lb-ev7t.title: Fix end-of-day report button Y-offset inconsistency
lb-ev7t.description: Day report uses panelH/2-40 for button Y while all other modals use panelH/2-45. Standardize.

lb-f17w.title: Show seasonal event flavor in GameplayScene UI
lb-f17w.description: Ensure new seasonal events display properly in the event notification area during gameplay

lb-fbl1.title: Events and random encounters
lb-fbl1.description: Random events that add variety: summer rush, heat wave, power outage, competitor, trends, supply chain events

lb-fkol.title: Event catalog: summer rush, heat wave, power outage, competitor, trend alert
lb-fkol.description: Implement specific events from the spec with unique mechanics and visual feedback

lb-fugy.title: Leaderboard button in challenge results has no text label
lb-fugy.description: In GameplayScene.showChallengeResults(), the leaderboard button label is just '🏆' (a trophy emoji) with no text. This makes it unclear that the button navigates to the leaderboard. The equivalent button in ChallengeScene correctly says '🏆 Leaderboard'. Fix: change the lbBtn text to '🏆 Leaderboard' to match.

lb-futq.title: Research tree for unlocking flavors and upgrades
lb-futq.description: Implement research point system. Players earn research points from milestones (days survived, customers served, revenue targets). Research tree UI lets players spend points to unlock new flavors, equipment upgrades, staff training programs, and marketing tools.

lb-fv5s.title: Remaining loc bypasses in GameState recipes/loyalty, GameplayScene HUD, RecipeScene, CustomerManager
lb-fv5s.description: Multiple location-scoped fields still accessed directly instead of through loc: GameState recipe methods (lines 1007-1047), loyalty methods (1051-1119); GameplayScene weather/staff/campaigns/loans/equipment display; RecipeScene recipe reads; CustomerManager recipe matching.

lb-g435.title: Customer spawning, ordering, patience, and serving flow
lb-g435.description: Customers spawn during serve phase, queue up, place orders, patience timer ticks down, player fills orders. Core serve-phase gameplay loop.

lb-ggv0.title: Reputation tracking with word-of-mouth and critic reviews
lb-ggv0.description: Expand reputation beyond simple served/lost ratio. Add critic review events, word-of-mouth customer spawn multiplier, satisfaction-weighted rep changes

lb-gjq3.title: VictoryScene/GameOverScene: career stats show wrong location's data in franchise mode
lb-gjq3.description: In franchise mode (Season 5), VictoryScene and GameOverScene both read gameState.loc.dayReports to compute career stats (totalDays, totalServed, totalLost). Since loc returns locations[currentLocationId], if the player was managing a non-Hometown location when the season ended, the stats will show only that newer location's reports (Season 5 only) instead of the full career history from location 0. Fix: in both scenes, always read from locations[0].dayReports when in franchise mode, or aggregate across all locations.

lb-gm7w.title: Reputation and marketing system
lb-gm7w.description: Star rating system, word of mouth, marketing campaigns, critic reviews, health inspections

lb-h5j6.title: Add volume and mute controls to SettingsScene
lb-h5j6.description: Add SFX volume slider and mute toggle to SettingsScene. Persist in localStorage with existing settings. Wire to AudioManager.

lb-h7lm.title: Dietary restriction violation gives no visible feedback to player
lb-h7lm.description:
When orderViolatesRestriction() fires at serve time the tip is withheld and satisfaction halved with no on-screen indication. Players cannot diagnose why reputation is quietly dropping.

The restriction icon (🌱/🚫🥜) on the customer sprite shows the restriction but not that the served order violated it.

Suggested: show a brief floating indicator (e.g. '⚠ Vegan violation') near the customer or on the revenue popup when a restriction is violated.

lb-hfq4.title: Franchise season results: totalRevenue display misses non-active locations' dailyRevenue
lb-hfq4.description:
In showSeasonResults() (GameplayScene.ts ~line 1227), totalRevenue is computed as s.seasonRevenue + s.loc.dailyRevenue. In franchise mode with multiple locations, s.loc.dailyRevenue is only the active location's last-day earnings. getSeasonResult() correctly sums all locations via allLocs.reduce(...dailyRevenue), so the displayed revenue figure and ✅/❌ indicator can diverge from the actual win/lose decision.

Fix: mirror the same allLocs pattern used in getSeasonResult() to compute totalRevenue in showSeasonResults(), e.g.:
  const pendingRevenue = s.franchiseMode && s.locations.length > 0
    ? s.locations.reduce((sum, loc) => sum + loc.dailyRevenue, 0)
    : s.loc.dailyRevenue;
  const totalRevenue = s.seasonRevenue + pendingRevenue;

Contrast with metRep which already correctly uses getFranchiseStats().totalReputation for franchise mode.

lb-hjy1.title: Fix forcedCustomerType not applied in challenge mode
lb-hjy1.description: ChallengeScene defines forcedCustomerType constraint but CustomerManager.spawnCustomer() never checks it. VIP Reception challenge spawns random customers instead of only VIPs.

lb-hn1q.title: reputationGainMult research bonus applied twice (double-counted)
lb-hn1q.description: NOT A BUG - calculateReputationChange applies base change internally. Lines 1097-1099 add only the research BONUS portion on top. repChange accumulates all deltas for display in the day report. Same pattern for campaign bonus (1104-1106) and signage (1110-1113). Each applies its own incremental bonus once.

lb-htc0.title: Fullscreen button in PauseScene is off-screen
lb-htc0.description: PauseScene has 15 buttons starting at y=120 with 44px spacing. Last button (Main Menu) is at y=736, and the fullscreen button is placed at y=790 — both beyond GAME_HEIGHT=720. The fullscreen button is never visible. Fix: either make the panel scrollable, reduce spacing, use a 2-column layout for secondary buttons, or move the fullscreen toggle to an overlay corner that doesn't depend on button list position.

lb-hu03.title: Store Management & Menu System
lb-hu03.description: Ingredients, recipes, menu editor, pricing, inventory management

lb-hz7a.title: Ensure minimum touch target sizes for mobile
lb-hz7a.description: Audit interactive elements across scenes to ensure minimum 44px touch targets. Key areas: ShopScene buy buttons, StaffScene actions, side panel items in GameplayScene, small text buttons in modals.

lb-i7uz.title: Add seasonal specialty flavors (pumpkin spice, peppermint)
lb-i7uz.description: Add seasonal specialty flavors mentioned in spec but not yet in catalog

lb-if57.title: Initialize project with TypeScript, Phaser 3, Vite, and basic folder structure
lb-if57.description: npm init, install phaser+typescript+vite, create src/ structure, tsconfig, index.html, main game entry point

lb-ijsx.title: Add PWA manifest and service worker for installability
lb-ijsx.description: Add web app manifest with icons, theme color, display: fullscreen. Add minimal service worker for offline caching.

lb-j00e.title: Seasonal events system
lb-j00e.description: Add season-specific events that only trigger during certain seasons, making each season feel more distinct and thematic

lb-j2b4.title: Catering offers only generated for active location in franchise mode
lb-j2b4.description: startNewDay() only generates catering offers for this.loc (active location). Other franchise locations never receive catering opportunities.

lb-jl24.title: Mid-season bankruptcy should trigger immediate game over
lb-jl24.description: Spec says Hard Fail triggers when debt exceeds ability to pay. Currently getSeasonResult() is only called from showSeasonResults(), which only fires when isSeasonComplete() is true (final day). A player whose balance drops below -100 mid-season continues playing until the last day, then sees GameOverScene. Fix: in the end-of-day Next Day handler, add a bankruptcy check that calls showSeasonResults() immediately if any location has money less than -100, even if isSeasonComplete() is false. Must check all locations in franchise mode.

lb-jof2.title: Fix ResearchScene broken scroll: wrong wheel event signature and bad maxScrollY calc
lb-jof2.description: The wheel event callback had 6 params instead of 4 (Phaser passes pointer, currentlyOver, deltaX, deltaY), so deltaY was always undefined. Also fixed maxScrollY using incorrect formula that depended on panel position.

lb-jql7.title: Franchise mode: revenue recorded to top-level GameState, not location
lb-jql7.description: In GameplayScene.ts:145-146, customer sale revenue always goes to this.gameState.dailyRevenue and this.gameState.money (top-level fields). But in franchise mode, wages/purchases/maintenance deduct from loc.money and loc.dailyExpenses (location-specific). After initFranchiseMode(), loc.money diverges from this.money: revenue accrues to this.money while expenses drain loc.money. FranchiseScene dashboard shows loc.money which never receives revenue and goes deeply negative. getFranchiseStats().totalRevenue sums loc.dailyRevenue which is always 0. Fix: route revenue through loc (gameState.loc.money and loc.dailyRevenue), and roll up loc.dailyRevenue to seasonRevenue in startNewDay.

lb-jsuc.title: Tutorial appears in Challenge mode on Day 1
lb-jsuc.description: GameplayScene.create() launches TutorialScene on Day 1 (line 94) but does not check this.challengeDef. Challenge mode players who have not seen the tutorial will get the new-player walkthrough mid-challenge. Fix: add !this.challengeDef to the guard condition.

lb-k01p.title: Staff morale and training system
lb-k01p.description: Staff morale affected by wages and conditions. Low morale reduces performance. Training programs improve skills over time.

lb-k2av.title: ShopScene supply hint text overlaps column headers
lb-k2av.description: The supply guidance hint (ShopScene.ts line 95) is placed at panelY + 83 (y=113). Column headers are at panelY + 95 (y=125). A 12px font renders ~14px tall so the hint overflows into the header row. Fix: move hint above the header row or shift headers down to panelY + 110.

lb-k3bu.title: getPriceSpawnMultiplier bypasses loc in franchise mode
lb-k3bu.description: CustomerManager.getPriceSpawnMultiplier() (added in feat-marketing-campaigns) reads this.gameState.flavors and this.gameState.menuPrices directly instead of this.gameState.loc.flavors and this.gameState.loc.menuPrices. In franchise mode, loc returns the active LocationState, so the price-to-traffic mechanic will use stale top-level data instead of the current location's menu prices. Fix: change both references in getPriceSpawnMultiplier() to use this.gameState.loc.flavors and this.gameState.loc.menuPrices.

lb-kbqr.title: runHealthInspection writes to top-level fields instead of loc in franchise mode
lb-kbqr.description: GameState.ts runHealthInspection() (around line 1487-1499) writes to this.reputation, this.lastInspectionDay, and this.closureDaysRemaining directly. In franchise mode these should write to this.loc.reputation, this.loc.lastInspectionDay, and this.loc.closureDaysRemaining. The LocationState interface has all three fields. This means health inspection results (reputation change and closure) don't affect the active location in Season 5.

lb-kn50.title: Cannot resupply during the day; running out is catastrophic
lb-kn50.description: Player feedback: current mechanics prevent mid-day resupply, and depleting any supply is completely catastrophic with no recovery path. Needs mitigation mechanics or clearer risk communication.

lb-ko58.title: supplierQualityBonus never resets between days
lb-ko58.description: In ShopScene.ts:272-273, supplierQualityBonus in the Phaser registry is set with Math.max(existing, bonus) but never cleared at end-of-day. Once a player buys from Premium Farms (0.10 bonus), the quality bonus applies permanently for the rest of the run regardless of which supplier is used on subsequent days. Fix: reset supplierQualityBonus to 0 at start of each prepare phase (when ShopScene opens normally, or in end-of-day reset logic).

lb-kp1j.title: Add Save/Load buttons to PauseScene for manual save slots
lb-kp1j.description: SaveManager already supports 3 manual slots (listSaves, getSaveData, deleteSave) but PauseScene has no Save/Load UI. Spec says 'manual save slots available'. Add Save Game and Load Game buttons to pause menu that show slot selection.

lb-ks7m.title: Exterior signage customization
lb-ks7m.description: Allow players to customize exterior signage and color schemes. Affects curb appeal which influences customer spawn rates. Purchasable through store customization menu.

lb-kt3n.title: Expanded flavor catalog
lb-kt3n.description: Add 15+ additional unlockable flavors beyond the 3 starters and season unlocks. Flavors should have varying popularity and unique ingredient requirements. Include: mint chip, cookies & cream, mango, pistachio, salted caramel, lavender, matcha, rocky road, butter pecan, cookie dough, coffee, lemon sorbet, coconut, raspberry, peanut butter.

lb-kwxk.title: Staff training progression UI
lb-kwxk.description: Training is just a button click. Add visible skill improvement tracking and training-in-progress state.

lb-l2lg.title: Low-stock warning indicator not refreshed after purchase in ShopScene
lb-l2lg.description: In ShopScene.ts:276, after buying stock, only stockText.setText(qty) is called — the low-stock ⚠ indicator and red color are not recalculated. If a player was at 5 units (red/⚠) and buys 2 batches to reach 25 units, the display still shows the old red ⚠ state. Fix: re-evaluate isLow and update stockText style/content after each purchase.

lb-ldv3.title: Customer System
lb-ldv3.description: Customer types, patience meters, preferences, loyalty system, order generation

lb-lgvb.title: Add catering contracts as a revenue source
lb-lgvb.description: Spec mentions catering contracts as revenue. Add a simple catering system: random catering requests appear, player can accept for guaranteed revenue but must have stock. Could be a new event type or a section in the marketing scene.

lb-lhws.title: Store decor theme system
lb-lhws.description: Add decor themes (Classic Parlor, Tropical, Modern, Retro Diner) with ambiance score. Higher ambiance increases customer patience and willingness to pay.

lb-lio4.title: Add gameplay side panels for inventory and orders
lb-lio4.description: Spec says 'Side panels: quick-access inventory, staff status, and active orders queue' but currently all info is accessed through modal scenes or compact top bar. Add collapsible side panels showing current inventory levels, staff status, and active order queue during serve phase.

lb-ljjm.title: Recipes: combine flavors and toppings into signature creations
lb-ljjm.description: Let players create named signature recipes (flavor + topping combos). Well-rated recipes attract repeat customers and can be priced at a premium.

lb-m2wz.title: Core event system with random daily events
lb-m2wz.description: Event system that triggers random events at day start. Events modify gameplay for that day. Include event notification UI and per-event effect application/removal.

lb-m4b8.title: Topping system with ingredient integration
lb-m4b8.description: Add toppings to customer orders. Toppings have their own ingredients and prices. Toppings bar equipment tiers gate how many toppings are available. Customers randomly request 0-3 toppings.

lb-mgkk.title: No guidance on how much of each supply to buy
lb-mgkk.description: Player feedback: unclear how much of each supply type is needed. Players have no way to estimate quantities before purchasing.

lb-mj41.title: ShopScene: supplier tab selection lost on scene.restart()
lb-mj41.description: ShopScene.currentSupplier is an instance field initialized to SUPPLIER_CATALOG[1] (Main Street). When a supplier tab is clicked, currentSupplier is updated then scene.restart() is called. On restart, the field reinitializes to Main Street, so the selected supplier is never applied. All tabs appear interactive but always revert to Main Street. Fix: persist the selected supplier ID to the Phaser registry (e.g. this.registry.set('selectedSupplier', supplier.id)) and restore it in create() before building the tab UI.

lb-mle0.title: Store customization and decor
lb-mle0.description: Interior decor themes, exterior signage, seating arrangements affecting capacity and ambiance score

lb-mm2v.title: Franchise bankruptcy check only tests active location
lb-mm2v.description: getSeasonResult() at GameState.ts:861 calls this.loc.money which only returns the current location's balance. In franchise mode with multiple locations, a non-active location could go deeply negative (bankrupt) without triggering hard_fail. Fix: iterate over all this.locations and return hard_fail if any location's money < -100.

lb-mn2a.title: breakdownMult event handler is dead code — no event sets this effect
lb-mn2a.description: EventManager.ts lines 323-332 add a handler for effects.breakdownMult, but no event in EVENT_CATALOG sets breakdownMult. The GameEventEffects interface defines the field but neither the pre-existing nor the new season-specific events use it. Either: (a) remove the dead handler, or (b) add breakdownMult to a relevant event (e.g. POWER_OUTAGE could set breakdownMult: 2.0 to risk equipment damage during outages, per the spec's 'Equipment breaks down over time' clause).

lb-mqxc.title: Dynamic ingredient price fluctuations
lb-mqxc.description: Spec says prices fluctuate based on season and demand. Currently prices are fixed per supplier. Add seasonal multipliers and demand-based adjustments.

lb-mrhq.title: Sandbox mode: health inspection can still close store
lb-mrhq.description: The spec requires sandbox mode to have 'no failure state', but health inspections are not bypassed. In GameplayScene.create() (lines 90-97), shouldTriggerInspection()/runHealthInspection() run unconditionally regardless of game mode. A failed inspection sets closureDaysRemaining > 0 and triggers showClosureNotice(), effectively closing the store in sandbox mode. Fix: skip the inspection trigger block when gameMode === 'sandbox', or zero out closureDaysRemaining after inspection in sandbox mode.

lb-mzff.title: Supplier data model and catalog
lb-mzff.description: Define SupplierDef interface and SUPPLIER_CATALOG with 3 suppliers having different price multipliers and quality.

lb-n8sv.title: HEAT_WAVE spoilage effect does nothing in franchise mode
lb-n8sv.description: applyEndOfDayEffects in EventManager.ts iterates gameState.ingredients (top-level) for the spoilageMult handler, but in franchise mode all ingredient operations go through gameState.loc.ingredients. The top-level array is stale after initFranchiseMode() copies it. The same commit fixed gameState.reputation → gameState.loc.reputation but missed ingredients. Fix: change 'for (const ing of gameState.ingredients)' to 'for (const ing of gameState.loc.ingredients)' at EventManager.ts line 315.

lb-nk2g.title: Story mode progression
lb-nk2g.description: 5 seasons with escalating challenges, unlock cities, revenue/reputation targets

lb-nm04.title: Supplier system with price fluctuations and bulk discounts
lb-nm04.description: Spec calls for dynamic supplier mechanics: price fluctuations based on season/demand, supplier shortages, and bulk-buy discount opportunities. Currently ingredients are purchased at flat rates.

lb-nrrt.title: New player onboarding improvements
lb-nrrt.description: Improve the new player experience with better tutorial coverage, contextual tips, and guided early gameplay

lb-nx7e.title: ShopScene: supply guidance tip overlaps column headers
lb-nx7e.description: In ShopScene.create(), the supply guidance tip is placed at panelY + 132 (center, 12px font) and column headers at panelY + 118 (14px font). Their vertical extents overlap (~128-142 for headers, ~136-148 for tip). Occurs when day <= 3 or totalStock < 30. Fix: move tip below items start, or push item rows down to accommodate it.

lb-oaao.title: FranchiseScene uses hardcoded low-stock threshold instead of LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD
lb-oaao.description: FranchiseScene.ts:180 uses hardcoded '< 10' for the low-stock alert. The shared constant LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD = 10 was added in constants.ts and is already used in GameplayScene and ShopScene. Replace the literal with the imported constant.

lb-occl.title: Mobile adaptation
lb-occl.description: Make the game playable on mobile devices with touch input, orientation handling, and PWA support

lb-ogiw.title: Franchise Overview scene with multi-location dashboard
lb-ogiw.description: New FranchiseScene showing all locations in a grid/list: name, revenue, reputation, staff count, alerts. Allow switching active location. Accessible from PauseScene or HUD. Only available in Season 5+.

lb-oh7s.title: unlockFlavor incomplete for new franchise locations
lb-oh7s.description: The e04e6bc fix correctly pushes newly unlocked flavors to all existing location.flavors, but does NOT update this.flavors (the top-level list). addLocation() at GameState.ts:848 initializes new location flavors from this.flavors.filter(f => f.unlocked), which is stale once franchise mode is active. Any flavor researched AFTER Season 5 begins is visible at existing locations but absent from locations opened afterward. Fix: also push flavorEntry to this.flavors in the franchise branch of unlockFlavor so addLocation always has the full set.

lb-pcny.title: Implement loyalty point redemption discounts
lb-pcny.description: Allow loyal customers to redeem accumulated points for discounts. Add redemption logic in customer ordering and display in MarketingScene.

lb-pct9.title: Staff Management
lb-pct9.description: Hiring, scheduling, skill stats, morale system

lb-pkvk.title: Apply scaledFontSize to season results modal in GameplayScene
lb-pkvk.description: The showSeasonResults() modal in GameplayScene uses hardcoded font sizes instead of scaledFontSize(), making it ignore the text size accessibility setting.

lb-qg1v.title: Franchise: addLocation checks this.money but UI checks loc.money
lb-qg1v.description: GameState.addLocation() checks this.money < setupCost and deducts from this.money (top-level). But FranchiseScene 'Open New Location' button guards with this.gameState.loc.money >= cost. In franchise mode, loc.money is the current location's balance (separate from the top-level this.money). Because of the revenue tracking split (lb-jql7), this.money grows with revenue while loc.money gets depleted by expenses. The UI can show the button disabled when the player has funds, or enabled when funds are in the wrong field. Fix: consolidate to a single money source, or check/deduct from the same field as the UI.

lb-qk32.title: Health inspection tied to player actions
lb-qk32.description: Health inspections are random events not tied to player behavior. Add cleanliness score based on equipment maintenance, expired goods, etc.

lb-rc41.title: Health inspections system
lb-rc41.description: Random health inspections: cleanliness/food safety compliance affects rating, can result in temporary closure if failed

lb-rhor.title: GameplayScene season retry sets s.money instead of s.loc.money in franchise mode
lb-rhor.description: GameplayScene.ts:1189 assigns 's.money = seasonDef.startingMoney' on season retry. After initFranchiseMode(), the active location's balance is at s.locations[0].money (accessed via s.loc.money), not the top-level s.money field. A season retry in franchise mode resets the wrong field, so the player keeps their actual money and the top-level stale field gets the reset value. Fix: change to s.loc.money = seasonDef.startingMoney.

lb-rnho.title: LeaderboardScene reset confirm dialog ignores text size accessibility setting
lb-rnho.description: showResetConfirm() in LeaderboardScene uses hardcoded font sizes ('18px', '14px') instead of scaledFontSize(this, N). All other text in LeaderboardScene correctly uses scaledFontSize. Fix by replacing the four hardcoded fontSize strings in showResetConfirm() with scaledFontSize calls: confirmBtn/cancelBtn/title text (18px -> scaledFontSize(this, 18)) and the warning text (14px -> scaledFontSize(this, 14)).

lb-ro49.title: Add background ambiance loops
lb-ro49.description: Add subtle procedural ambient sounds: shop bustle during serve phase, calm during prep. Use oscillators with low volume.

lb-rtw5.title: Bulk discount tiers in ShopScene
lb-rtw5.description: Add quantity-based discounts: buying 3+ batches gives 10% off, 5+ gives 20% off.

lb-ruly.title: Season results stats only show active location data in franchise mode
lb-ruly.description: showSeasonResults() uses s.loc.dayReports and s.loc.money for the stats summary, but in franchise mode this only shows the active location. Should aggregate customers served/lost and balance across all locations.

lb-s251.title: End-of-day financial report with charts
lb-s251.description: Detailed P&L breakdown, historical trend, customer satisfaction metrics

lb-s4kc.title: Project Scaffolding & Core Architecture
lb-s4kc.description: Set up TypeScript + Phaser 3 project, build tooling, and core game architecture

lb-s6g1.title: Tutorial never fires: day===1 check runs after startNewDay() increments day to 2
lb-s6g1.description: In GameplayScene.create(), startNewDay() is called at line 50, which does this.day++. GameState initializes day=1, so after startNewDay() it becomes 2. The tutorial trigger at line 109 checks this.gameState.day === 1, which is always false for new games. Fix: change the check to day === 2 (the first day after increment) or move the check before startNewDay() is called.

lb-sazy.title: Wire up SFX to gameplay events
lb-sazy.description: Add sound triggers to GameplayScene (serve, customer arrive/leave, day start/end), ShopScene (purchase), StaffScene (hire), MainMenuScene (button clicks), and other key interactions.

lb-sgoc.title: Fix build script: tsc not on PATH
lb-sgoc.description: package.json build script uses bare tsc which fails when not on PATH. Use npx tsc instead.

lb-skkb.title: Charity Drive event - interactive donation
lb-skkb.description: Make Charity Drive an interactive event where player chooses donation level during prep phase, like the Local Fair pop-up booth

lb-ss8m.title: Fix GameOverScene target text low contrast against dark background
lb-ss8m.description: Target values use color #555 (dark gray) which is hard to read on dark panel. Change to lighter color for readability.

lb-st3l.title: Customer loyalty system
lb-st3l.description: Track repeat customers with loyalty points. Loyal customers visit more often and are more patient. Loyalty card campaign should integrate with this system. Show top customers in a loyalty panel.

lb-sua0.title: Soft fail has no continue-with-reduced-score path to next season
lb-sua0.description: SPEC: 'Soft Fail: miss targets but stay solvent — replay the season or accept a reduced score.' Current implementation only offers Retry Season or Main Menu. There is no option to accept a reduced score and advance. Players who cannot beat a season can never progress past it. Add a third button (e.g. 'Continue Anyway') that advances to the next season without a win bonus.

lb-swfj.title: Add dedicated GameOverScene for bankruptcy hard fail
lb-swfj.description: Create a game over scene with proper visual treatment for bankruptcy. Shows final stats and option to return to main menu. Replace inline hard fail handling in GameplayScene.

lb-syaq.title: TutorialScene spotlight cutout is non-functional
lb-syaq.description: showStep() calls this.overlay.fillStyle(0x000000, 0) intending to cut a hole in the overlay, but never calls fillRect afterward so nothing transparent is drawn. Phaser Graphics doesn't support subtractive compositing — a GeometryMask or RenderTexture is needed to make the underlying UI visible. Currently only the yellow border renders; the game UI behind the overlay stays hidden. Either implement a proper mask or remove the cutout and rely solely on the border.

lb-sywu.title: Apply scaledFontSize to all remaining scenes (~230 hardcoded font sizes)
lb-sywu.description: 19 scene files still have hardcoded fontSize values that don't respect text size accessibility. Convert all to scaledFontSize(). Scenes: ShopScene(15), ChallengeScene(16), MarketingScene(15), TutorialScene(5), FranchiseScene(10), EquipmentScene(13), StaffScene(21), SeatingScene(8), BootScene(1), RecipeScene(21), PauseScene(8), SettingsScene(13), MainMenuScene(11), ResearchScene(10), PopUpBoothScene(18), LoanScene(14), SignageScene(8), DecorScene(8), MenuEditorScene(15).

lb-t5zv.title: Loan system for expansion capital
lb-t5zv.description: Borrow capital for big expansions, interest accrues if not paid back promptly

lb-tci1.title: Ambient audio volume ignores live settings changes
lb-tci1.description: AudioManager.startAmbience() bakes the current volume into the GainNode at call time. When the user later changes volume or toggles mute via SettingsScene, the active ambient GainNode is not updated. The ambient hum continues at the old level even after muting. Fix: when setVolume/setMuted is called, update ambientNodes.gain.gain.setValueAtTime() to reflect the new effective volume.

lb-th5b.title: getFranchiseStats returns dailyRevenue as totalRevenue in non-franchise fallback
lb-th5b.description: In GameState.getFranchiseStats(), the non-franchise fallback returns totalRevenue: this.dailyRevenue (today's revenue only) instead of a meaningful total. The field name implies cumulative revenue. FranchiseScene uses this value for the stats bar display. While FranchiseScene is only accessible in franchise mode (making the non-franchise path dead code today), the misleading field name is a latent bug if this function is ever called outside franchise mode.

lb-th70.title: Low balance warning misses non-active franchise locations
lb-th70.description: In a4ceb71, the low balance warning (GameplayScene.ts:1261) only checks s.loc.money (active location). But startNewDay() deducts wages and maintenance from ALL franchise locations each day. A non-active location can go below -100 (hard_fail threshold) with no warning shown to the player. Fix: in story mode, check all locations money and show a warning if ANY location is negative.

lb-tk22.title: Polish: rename Retry to Retry Challenge, theme partial victory button silver
lb-tk22.description: Challenge results button said Retry (ambiguous); partial victory button used same gold as full victory

lb-tp8c.title: Level one feels tedious and too long
lb-tp8c.description: Player feedback: level 1 drags on and hasn't been completed in testing. May need pacing adjustments or length reduction.

lb-tx21.title: Franchise mode: startNewDay only processes active location
lb-tx21.description: In GameState.startNewDay(), all per-day processing (ingredient expiry, staff wages, equipment maintenance, loan interest, daily counter resets) only runs on the currently active location via this.loc. Non-active locations in franchise mode never pay wages, never expire ingredients, and never have their dailyRevenue counted toward seasonRevenue when they are not active. This gives an unintended advantage and makes the season revenue target harder to reach for the active location alone. Fix: iterate all locations for daily processing, or document the intended design (each location only progresses when it is the active one).

lb-u1sb.title: Trending flavor event doesn't affect customer orders
lb-u1sb.description: The Flavor Trend Alert event picks a trendingFlavorId but CustomerManager never reads it. Customers should strongly prefer the trending flavor when this event is active.

lb-u8ep.title: UI/HUD Implementation
lb-u8ep.description: Top bar, main store view, side panels, pause menu screens

lb-u98l.title: Display ambiance score in store customization UI
lb-u98l.description: Decor themes have ambiance values that affect patience and price tolerance, but the player never sees this score. Show the ambiance score in the decor/customization scenes so players understand the impact of their choices.

lb-uje6.title: Customer dietary restrictions and flavor preferences
lb-uje6.description: Spec mentions customers with dietary restrictions (vegan, nut-free) and flavor likes/dislikes. Currently no preference system exists in Customer class.

lb-uqyo.title: High menu prices don't reduce customer traffic
lb-uqyo.description: Spec says 'price too high → fewer customers' but no logic reduces spawn rate based on menu prices. Players can set arbitrarily high prices with no traffic penalty.

lb-uva1.title: Expand tutorial to cover pricing, reputation, and staff basics
lb-uva1.description: The tutorial currently only covers buying ingredients and serving. Add steps explaining: (1) the menu editor and suggested price tool, (2) how reputation/stars work and affect customer flow, (3) how to hire and assign staff from the pause menu. Keep it concise - just awareness, not deep dives.

lb-v5nj.title: Seating arrangement system
lb-v5nj.description: Purchasable seating options that affect customer capacity and ambiance. More/better seating increases max queue length and ambiance.

lb-va38.title: TipManager reads stale top-level fields instead of gs.loc in franchise mode
lb-va38.description: TipManager.ts checks gs.staff (line 35), gs.equipment (line 45), and gs.activeCampaigns (line 77) directly on the GameState top-level instead of gs.loc. After initFranchiseMode() runs in Season 5, those top-level arrays become stale; only gs.loc.staff, gs.loc.equipment, and gs.loc.activeCampaigns are current. The hire_staff, equipment_worn, and try_marketing tips will evaluate incorrect conditions in franchise mode. Fix: update the three tip conditions to use gs.loc.staff, gs.loc.equipment, and gs.loc.activeCampaigns.

lb-vh7k.title: Staff turnover: low morale causes staff to quit
lb-vh7k.description: Spec says 'Low morale leads to slower service and higher turnover.' Currently morale only reduces stats. Add mechanic: staff with morale <20 for 3+ consecutive days have increasing chance to quit. Notify player when staff leaves.

lb-vl3q.title: Sandbox mode: unlimited funds and no-fail state
lb-vl3q.description: Sandbox mode is selectable but has no special mechanics. Fix: give sandbox 99999 starting money, disable bankruptcy hard-fail, and skip season-end failure screens. Check MainMenuScene for game start and GameplayScene for end-of-season logic.

lb-vpf7.title: Remaining stale top-level field reads in GameplayScene bypass loc in franchise mode
lb-vpf7.description:
Three places in GameplayScene still read top-level GameState fields instead of s.loc, which are stale copies after initFranchiseMode():
1. Line 511: s.staff.filter(...) for HUD staff count — should be s.loc.staff
2. Lines 529/533: s.ingredients for stock warnings and emergency resupply button — should be s.loc.ingredients
3. Lines 901/1293: s.reputation in end-of-day report and season-end recap — should be s.loc.reputation
In franchise mode these reads show data from the pre-franchise snapshot, not the active location.

lb-vprf.title: Add leaderboard access from ChallengeScene and results screen
lb-vprf.description: Add View Leaderboard button to ChallengeScene header and challenge results screen

lb-vs0r.title: Serving styles with different prices
lb-vs0r.description: Add serving styles: single/double/triple scoop cones, cups, sundaes, milkshakes, floats. Each style has a base price multiplier and ingredient cost multiplier. Customers choose a random style. Milkshakes/floats require blender equipment.

lb-vsat.title: Serving styles and toppings
lb-vsat.description: Add serving styles (cone/cup/sundae/milkshake/float) and toppings (sprinkles, hot fudge, whipped cream, etc.) to orders. Toppings bar equipment should gate topping availability. Different styles have different base prices and ingredient costs.

lb-vwcd.title: Audio & SFX system
lb-vwcd.description: Add procedural sound effects to the game using Web Audio API. Includes AudioManager, SFX for all key interactions, background ambiance, and volume/mute settings.

lb-w5rb.title: Challenge leaderboard scene
lb-w5rb.description: Add a leaderboard scene showing all challenge best scores, stars, and rankings in one place. Accessible from ChallengeScene.

lb-wlsu.title: Apply colorblind palette and text size multiplier across UI scenes
lb-wlsu.description: The SettingsScene stores colorblind mode and text size in the registry, but no scenes actually read and apply these settings yet. Update GameplayScene HUD, floating text, and key UI scenes to use TEXT_SIZE_MULTIPLIERS and COLORBLIND_PALETTE from the registry gameSettings.

lb-x7xl.title: Add equipment degradation warning in HUD
lb-x7xl.description: Show a visual indicator in the HUD when equipment condition drops below 50%. Players currently have no way to know equipment is degrading until it breaks.

lb-x8b1.title: getSeasonResult misreads pending revenue in non-franchise mode
lb-x8b1.description: In GameState.getSeasonResult() (~line 998), the non-franchise path uses [this as any] to build allLocs, then reads loc.dailyRevenue off the GameState object itself. But GameState.dailyRevenue (top-level field) is never updated after migration — all revenue goes to this.loc.dailyRevenue in GameplayScene. So pendingRevenue is always 0 in non-franchise story mode, meaning the last day's revenue is ignored in the win check. A player who hits the revenue target on the final day gets soft_fail instead of win. Fix: change [this as any] to [this.loc] in the non-franchise branch of getSeasonResult().

lb-xho3.title: Add dedicated VictoryScene for completing all 5 seasons
lb-xho3.description: Create a proper victory scene with stats summary, season recap, and celebration visuals when player completes all 5 story mode seasons. Replace inline victory text in GameplayScene.

lb-xn7h.title: Suggested price tool in menu editor
lb-xn7h.description: SPEC mentions a suggested price tool. Add a 'Suggested Price' button per menu item in MenuEditorScene that calculates recommended price based on ingredient cost, reputation, and demand. Simple formula: baseCost * (1 + reputation/5) with a floor.

lb-xrw5.title: Equipment condition degradation system
lb-xrw5.description: Equipment has condition field and repair UI but no active degradation. Add daily condition decrease based on equipment tier breakdownChance in startNewDay(). When condition hits 0, set broken=true. Broken equipment should not function during serve phase.

lb-xtgt.title: Season 5 progression: open new locations as goals
lb-xtgt.description: Season 5 mechanics: player starts with 1 location and can open additional locations using capital. Each new location has a setup cost. Season win condition requires meeting aggregate revenue/reputation targets across all locations. Update SEASON_CATALOG entry and isSeasonComplete/getSeasonResult logic.

lb-xw7k.title: Customer preferences influence order generation
lb-xw7k.description: Customers have likedFlavors/dislikedFlavors but order generation ignores them. Should weight liked flavors 2x and avoid disliked flavors.

lb-y184.title: Challenge mode with daily scenarios
lb-y184.description: Implement challenge mode: daily community challenges with specific constraints (limited ingredients, time pressure, special customer types). Score based on revenue, satisfaction, and efficiency.

lb-y5kq.title: Equipment breakdown & repair system
lb-y5kq.description: SPEC says equipment breaks down over time and requires maintenance/repair. Currently equipment can be purchased but never degrades. Add: condition tracking per equipment, random breakdown events, repair cost/time, preventive maintenance option.

lb-y7yj.title: ShopScene hint text overlaps money display
lb-y7yj.description: The supply guidance hint (panelY + 68) overlaps the balance/money text (panelY + 60, fontSize 20px ~20px tall). Both use setOrigin(0.5) and their vertical ranges collide. The hint should be repositioned between the money display and column headers (e.g. panelY + 80 or higher) or the money text should move up.

lb-y8f1.title: Prep phase ambience never started despite AudioManager supporting it
lb-y8f1.description: Commit adc0a35 claims 'Add background ambiance loops for serve and prep phases', but startAmbience('prep') is never called in GameplayScene. AudioManager.startAmbience('prep') is implemented (low 80Hz tone) but has no call site. It should be called when the PREPARE phase begins (DayPhase.PREPARE block in GameplayScene.ts ~line 622) and stopped when the serve phase starts (before audio.startAmbience('serve')). Currently the prep phase has no ambient audio.

lb-ymsa.title: Daily challenge rotation system
lb-ymsa.description: Implement date-based daily rotation for challenge mode. The spec says 'daily community challenges' but currently all 6 challenges are always available. Add a 'Challenge of the Day' that rotates based on the current date, using a deterministic seed so all players get the same daily challenge.

lb-ypij.title: Equipment system and upgrades
lb-ypij.description: Ice cream maker, freezer, soft-serve machine, blender, toppings bar, POS. Each has upgrade tiers affecting speed/capacity/quality. Breakdown/maintenance mechanic.

lb-yrik.title: Add ingredient waste tracking and waste log in end-of-day report
lb-yrik.description: Spec says end-of-day report should include a 'waste log'. Currently ingredients expire silently in startNewDay. Track expired ingredient quantities and display waste summary in the daily report.

lb-yx8r.title: supplierQualityBonus wiped when switching supplier tabs mid-shop
lb-yx8r.description: In ShopScene.create(), the supplierQualityBonus registry key is unconditionally reset to 0 at the start of every non-emergency create() call. When a player buys from Premium Farms (earning the 0.10 quality bonus) and then clicks another supplier tab, scene.restart() triggers create() again, which resets supplierQualityBonus to 0. The player paid the 25% price premium but loses the bonus. Fix: only reset supplierQualityBonus when the shop is freshly opened (not on tab-switch restarts). Track a shopJustOpened registry flag set by the caller before launching ShopScene, and only reset the bonus when that flag is present.

lb-z5qm.title: Add contextual gameplay tips system for post-tutorial guidance
lb-z5qm.description: After the tutorial ends, show contextual tips at key moments: first equipment breakdown, first low reputation, first staff hire available, etc. Use a TipManager that tracks which tips have been shown and triggers them based on game state conditions.

lb-z7jw.title: Season 5 soft-fail has no accept-reduced-score ending
lb-z7jw.description: Spec says: 'Soft Fail: miss targets but stay solvent — replay the season or accept a reduced score.' For seasons 1-4, the Continue Anyway button lets the player advance with a reduced score. For season 5 there is no next season, so the button is hidden (guarded by nextSeasonDef existing). A player who soft-fails season 5 can only Retry Season or Main Menu — no path to accept a partial completion. Add a soft-fail ending screen for season 5 soft-fail (e.g., a modified version of VictoryScene showing partial completion) rather than silently routing to main menu.

lb-z9jc.title: Add season field to GameEventDef and filter events by current season
lb-z9jc.description: Add optional seasons array to GameEventDef so events can be restricted to specific seasons. Update rollForEvent to filter by current season. Add 8-10 new season-specific events across all 5 seasons.

lb-zc6s.title: Season retry in franchise mode only resets current location money
lb-zc6s.description: In GameplayScene, the season retry path does: s.loc.money = seasonDef.startingMoney. In franchise mode this only resets the currently active location balance; other franchise locations retain their money. Meanwhile seasonRevenue is fully reset to 0. Fix: on season retry in franchise mode, reset all location balances (e.g. distribute startingMoney equally), or reset only seasonRevenue and leave money as-is with a note that this is intentional.
